title: coleus dinteri
intro: Coleus dinteri, also known as the Kudu Cabbage or Coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to southern Africa and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Coleus dinteri include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
